# Source Whitelist: AI agent frameworks

Trusted sources for this domain. Articles from non-listed sources get lower priority.

## Tier 1 (High trust)
- TechCrunch
- VentureBeat
- OpenAI Blog
- Anthropic Blog

## Tier 2 (Medium trust)
- The Verge
- Ars Technica
- Hacker News

## Tier 3 (Low trust, verify claims)
- Medium
- Dev.to
- Reddit
